ocr.text: The table presents data for PhiX-Bv and PhiX-GA across varying filters, detailing Expected (%)a, Observed (%)b, and
Percentage bases removed. For the No filter condition, Expected (%)a for PhiX-Bv is 4.549, Observed (%)b is 0.650, and
Percentage bases removed is 0.0; for PhiX-GA, Expected (%)a is 5.829, Observed (%)b is 1.555, and Percentage bases removed
is 0.0. The ChF filter shows PhiX-Bv with Expected (%)a at 2.989, Observed (%)b at 0.399, and Percentage bases removed at
4.8, while PhiX-GA has Expected (%)a at 5.292, Observed (%)b at 1.349, and Percentage bases removed at 2.0. The C33 filter
results indicate PhiX-Bv Expected (%)a is 2.121, Observed (%)b is 0.274, with Percentage bases removed at 9.3, whereas
PhiX-GA has Expected (%)a at 4.823, Observed (%)b at 1.113, and Percentage bases removed at 3.3. For the B-tail filter, PhiX-
Bv shows Expected (%)a as 0.166, Observed (%)b as 0.130, and Percentage bases removed at 7.0; PhiX-GA has Expected (%)a
of 0.194, Observed (%)b of 0.309, and Percentage bases removed of 9.0. The B-tail + ChF combination yields PhiX-Bv
Expected (%)a at 0.137, Observed (%)b at 0.107, and Percentage bases removed at 9.1, while PhiX-GA has Expected (%)a of
0.182, Observed (%)b of 0.280, and Percentage bases removed of 9.9.
PhiX-Bv  PhiX-GA
Expected (%)a  Observed (%)b  Percentage bases removed  Expected (%)a  Observed (%)b  Percentage bases removed
The B-tail + N filter shows PhiX-Bv with Expected (%)a at 0.159, Observed (%)b at 0.130, and Percentage bases removed at
7.2; PhiX-GA results are Expected (%)a at 0.187, Observed (%)b at 0.310, and Percentage bases removed at 9.5. The B-tail +
C33 configuration has PhiX-Bv Expected (%)a at 0.106, Observed (%)b at 0.088, and Percentage bases removed at 12.2, while
PhiX-GA shows Expected (%)a at 0.172, Observed (%)b at 0.251, and Percentage bases removed at 10.5. For the B-tail + A30
filter, PhiX-Bv has Expected (%)a at 0.114, Observed (%)b at 0.092, and Percentage bases removed at 11.3; PhiX-GA has
Expected (%)a at 0.172, Observed (%)b at 0.262, and Percentage bases removed at 10.5. The B-tail + ChF + C33 combination
has PhiX-Bv with Expected (%)a of 0.105, Observed (%)b of 0.087, and Percentage bases removed of 12.5, while PhiX-GA
reports Expected (%)a at 0.170, Observed (%)b at 0.248, and Percentage bases removed at 10.9. Lastly, the B-tail + ChF + A30
filter results show PhiX-Bv Expected (%)a at 0.113, Observed (%)b at 0.091, and Percentage bases removed at 11.6; PhiX-GA
has Expected (%)a at 0.170, Observed (%)b at 0.257, and Percentage bases removed at 10.8.
